name: First State Bank
description_short: Community bank serving Socorro and Catron Counties, NM since 1947, offering personal and business banking, lending, credit cards, and online digital banking.
description_long:
First State Bank is a locally-rooted community bank that has operated in Socorro and Catron Counties, New Mexico for over 70 years, since its founding in 1947. The institution positions itself as a relationship-driven alternative to larger regional banks, emphasizing personal service and local decision-making. The bank maintains branch locations in both Socorro and Catron Counties and operates 14 surcharge-free ATMs across the region.

First State Bank offers a comprehensive suite of retail and business banking services including personal and business checking accounts, savings accounts with investment options, IRAs, mortgages, personal and business lending products, and credit cards. The bank provides online digital banking access for account management, mobile banking apps (FSBig on Mobile for personal customers and FSBig on Biz for business customers), and a mortgage calculator tool. Customer service is available via phone for debit cards, credit cards, and lending inquiries, with both local and toll-free numbers provided.

The bank distinguishes itself through its stated focus on community involvement, reporting that it has served more than half of businesses in Socorro and Catron Counties. Operating since 1947 positions it as an established regional institution with institutional memory in its markets. The emphasis on personal, local customer service and the availability of video call banking represent modern conveniences combined with community banking accessibility.

As a community bank with limited geographic footprint (two counties in New Mexico), First State Bank's services and accessibility are geographically constrained. The website content does not provide specific APR rates, fee schedules, loan terms, or detailed product specifications that would allow comparison with competitors. Business hours are limited to Monday-Friday, 9am-5pm, which may not accommodate customers needing weekend or extended banking hours.
services: Business mobile banking (FSBig on Biz app)
pros: 14 surcharge-free ATMs across Socorro and Catron Counties for cardholders
Established institution with 70+ year history serving the same two-county region
Reports serving more than half of businesses in Socorro and Catron Counties
Mobile banking apps (FSBig on Mobile and FSBig on Biz) for convenient account access
Video call banking option for remote customer service
Online digital banking platform for account management from anywhere
Routing number publicly available (112201959) for direct deposits and transfers
cons: Geographically limited to Socorro and Catron Counties, NM only — not accessible to out-of-region customers
No specific APR rates, fees, or product terms disclosed on website, making comparison difficult
Limited business hours (Mon-Fri 9am-5pm, closed weekends) restrict customer access
Website does not specify minimum balances, deposit requirements, or eligibility criteria for accounts
No mention of FDIC insurance limits or account protections beyond reference to FDIC Call Center
best_for: Small business owners in Socorro or Catron Counties seeking personalized lending relationships
Residents of Socorro and Catron Counties looking for local community banking with relationship-based service
Customers who value established local institutions with deep community roots over national chains
Individuals and businesses already operating in the Socorro/Catron area seeking convenient ATM access
diagnosis: First State Bank is best for customers with ongoing banking needs in Socorro or Catron Counties, NM who prioritize personal relationships and local decision-making over the convenience of national branch networks. The main caveat is strict geographic limitation — this bank does not serve customers outside its two-county footprint, making it inaccessible to most consumers seeking regional or national banking options.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
